Stop.command:
bash -c '
DIR="myinsights"
INDEX="myinsights/1nsights.md"
CLAUDE="CLAUDE.md"

# Check if myinsights/ has any uncommitted changes
if [ -d "$DIR" ] && (git diff --name-only -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git diff --name-only --cached -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$DIR" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .); then
  
  # Auto-add insights reference to CLAUDE.md on first time
  if ! grep -q "myinsights" "$CLAUDE" 2>/dev/null; then
    printf "\n## Development Insights\nIndex: myinsights/1nsights.md — check here FIRST before debugging.\n" >> "$CLAUDE"
    git add "$CLAUDE"
    echo "Added myinsights reference to CLAUDE.md"
  fi
  
  # Auto-commit all changes in myinsights/
  git add "$DIR"
  git commit -m "docs(insights): update knowledge base"
  echo "myinsights/ auto-committed"
fi
'

bash -c '
ROADMAP=".claude/feature-roadmap.json"
if [ -f "$ROADMAP" ] && (git diff --name-only -- "$ROADMAP" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git diff --name-only --cached -- "$ROADMAP" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$ROADMAP" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .); then
  git add "$ROADMAP"
  git commit -m "docs(roadmap): update feature status"
  echo "feature-roadmap.json auto-committed"
fi
'

bash -c '
PLANS="docs/plans"
if [ -d "$PLANS" ] && (git diff --name-only -- "$PLANS" 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "$PLANS" 2>/dev/null | grep -q .); then
  git add "$PLANS"
  git commit -m "docs(plans): update implementation plans"
  echo "docs/plans/ auto-committed"
fi
'
